name: Odawara Auto-Machine Mfg. Co., Ltd.
summary: Odawara Auto-Machine Mfg. Co., Ltd. designs, manufactures, and sells bus and railway fare collecting equipment. The company offers fare boxes, ticket machines, IC card systems, ticket issuing machines, LCD fare indicators, speech synthesis guide devices, IC card systems, data management systems, and bus location systems. It also provides fare boxes and fare indicators for railway vehicles, as well as departure signs and various indicators for stations and platforms. In addition, the company offers system development, engineering, and software design services. Odawara Auto-Machine Mfg. Co., Ltd. was founded in 1950 and is headquartered in Odawara, Japan.
